boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Energy / utilities / infrastructure controls action now? Action: field work dispatch with expired permit. Boundary: scheduler message cannot dispatch without permit closure.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source record closes the permit dependency.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Exact boundary remains open; permit closure required first.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: permit|crew certification|work order match remain unresolved

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The controlling source record states the required permit, crew certification, and work order match do not close, and the communication boundary forbids dispatch without permit closure. Exact source control remains open, so the proper result is ESCALATE rather than ALLOW.
